name: send_email
description: Send an email to one or more recipients via SparkPost's Transmissions API. You can provide inline HTML/text content, reference a stored template, or use A/B test variants. Each recipient can receive personalized content via substitution data. Messages can be scheduled up to 3 days in the future. Maximum content size is 20MB.

parameters.name: recipients
parameters.description: Array of recipient objects, each containing an 'address' object with 'email' and optional 'name'. Alternatively, reference a stored recipient list with {"list_id": "my-list"}.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Email content. For inline: provide 'from', 'subject', 'html', and/or 'text'. For stored template: provide 'template_id'. For A/B testing: provide 'ab_test_id'.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Sending options including open_tracking, click_tracking, transactional flag, sandbox mode, and start_time for scheduled delivery.

parameters.name: substitution_data
parameters.description: Global substitution data applied to all recipients. Per-recipient substitution_data overrides these values.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Key-value metadata attached to the transmission. Appears in webhook events. Maximum 10KB.

parameters.name: campaign_id
parameters.description: Campaign identifier for grouping transmissions. Maximum 64 bytes.

content.subject: Your order has shipped, {{first_name}}!
content.html:
Hello {{first_name}}!

Your order #{{order_id}} has shipped and is on its way.
content.text: Hello {{first_name}}! Your order #{{order_id}} has shipped and is on its way.
